baseline.semantics: Use the arithmetic mean of the prior 8 weekly crime_count values for the same segment.
baseline.zeroFillRule: Missing weekly rows are treated as zero crime_count after a segment's first observed week.

precinctsByBorough.semantics: Known precincts use the Overview all-time aggregate dominant-borough assignment; unmappable and noncanonical source rows are withheld.

forecastSemantics.grain: forecast week + borough + precinct + offense type + law category
forecastSemantics.interpretationBoundary: Point estimates describe aggregate reported-event volume; they do not predict individual behavior or a specific future incident location.
forecastSemantics.observationHorizon: The forecast is next-week only relative to the fixed repository source horizon, not relative to the current wall clock.
forecastSemantics.partialWeekUse: The model and selected baseline may use the latest partial observed week as prior information; the target week itself is excluded from features.
forecastSemantics.target: Expected aggregate reported complaint-event volume for one segment-week.

limitations: The contract contains point estimates only; no confidence or prediction interval exists.
The latest observed source week is partial and can depress lag-based forecast values.
The source forecast covers all historical model segments, including inactive and zero-prediction segments; published rows are the map-compatible subset.
UNKNOWN offense is an explicit aggregate classification label, not a fabricated category.
Unmappable or noncanonical borough/precinct source rows are withheld and quantified.
This key-only contract embeds no coordinate, centroid, boundary, or geometry; the separate verified Phase 7C.3 spatial-reference contract supplies the complete administrative precinct boundaries.
Reporting, classification, delay, revision, and model error affect these estimates.
Forecasts are not crime certainty, neighborhood-danger scores, or grounds for action.

locationKeySemantics.coverage: All known precinct labels that pass the canonical borough mapping have an opaque key. This key-only contract does not embed the separate verified Phase 7C.3 precinct geometry; runtime reconciliation validates its complete coverage against that dedicated contract.

methodology.baselineSelection: Use the manifest-selected documented prior-only baseline when its artifact matches every ML forecast logical key; otherwise publish null baseline/change values.
methodology.changeArithmetic: expectedChangeCount = rounded predictedCount - rounded historicalBaseline; expectedChangePct = expectedChangeCount / historicalBaseline * 100 only when baseline is positive.
methodology.freshnessPolicy: No wall-clock TTL is invented. Stale means the model training/forecast horizon is behind the validated weekly/Overview observation horizon.
methodology.generationTimestampPolicy: generatedAtUtc is deterministically the maximum aggregate-safe event date at 00:00:00Z; the current clock is never read.
methodology.precinctBoroughPolicy: For each known precinct, use the borough with the largest all-time weekly aggregate count; ties use borough lexical order. Source rows with UNKNOWN geography or a noncanonical borough are withheld, never remapped or summed.

historicalError.filterSemantics: Historical errors are not recomputed for dashboard filters.
historicalError.scope: overall time-based model backtest across all source segments

independentTrainingTime.reason: No independent training-completion timestamp is recorded.

baselineManifest.publishedUse: Allowlisted baseline selection and prior-only semantics only.

baselinePredictions.publishedUse: Selected aggregate prior-only baseline values only.

mlManifest.publishedUse: Allowlisted model identity, horizon, window, and leakage controls only.

mlMetrics.publishedUse: Allowlisted aligned overall historical error metrics only.

mlPredictions.publishedUse: Validated aggregate next-week point estimates only.

overview.publishedUse: Validated safe dates, complete-week status, and filter alignment only.

weeklyAggregate.publishedUse: Observation horizon and aggregate canonical precinct mapping only.
